side_frame.notes: Patented friction fit channel. Used for both horizontal and vertical slat systems.

cfc_cover.description: Concealed Fixing Cover - snap-on C-channel for side frame - 5800mm
cfc_cover.notes: Snaps onto side frame to conceal fixings. 1 per side frame.

slat_90mm.description: QuickScreen 90mm Slat with centre web - 6100mm long
slat_90mm.notes: 90x16.5mm slat. Height formula: ((90 + gap) * num_slats) - gap + 3

slat_65mm.description: XPRESS 65mm Slat with centre web - 6100mm long
slat_65mm.notes: 65x16.5mm slat. Height formula: ((65 + gap) * num_slats) - gap + 3

f_section.notes: Used instead of side frame where screen meets wall or void. One arm captures slat, other fixes to wall.

horizontal_u_channel.description: U-channel horizontal rail for vertical slat system - 5000mm
horizontal_u_channel.notes: Used as top and bottom rail in vertical slat configuration.

centre_support_rail.notes: Required for panels wider than 2000mm. Includes snap-on concealed fixing cover. Price list code is XP-5800-CSR, not QS-5800-CS.

centre_support_cap.notes: Nylon end cap for centre support rail. Price list code is XP-CSRC. Limited colours: B, G, MN, S, SM, W.

centre_support_plate.notes: Includes 2x countersunk screws. Used to fix centre support to floor/overhead. Price list code is XP-BTP.

adapter_135deg.description: 135 degree adapter for angled screen runs
adapter_135deg.notes: NOT FOUND in price list as separate SKU. May be a custom/special order item or included as part of an assembly. Flag for manual verification.

side_frame_cap.notes: Only BLACK found in price list (QS-SFC-B at $0.86). Other colours may need verification.

post_50_2400.notes: 2400mm posts include aluminium flat top cap. Standard post for most installations.

post_50_6000.notes: 6000mm posts do NOT include cap - order separately. Used for tall screens or cut-to-length.

post_65_2400.description: 65x65mm Heavy Duty Post - 2400mm (includes flat top cap)
post_65_2400.notes: Heavy duty for taller/wider screens, sliding gates. Includes flat top cap.

post_65_6000.notes: Heavy duty long post. Cap NOT included.

base_plate_50.notes: Includes 4x countersunk screws. For surface-mounted posts. Price list code is XP-BP-SET (not XP-BP-50).

base_plate_65.notes: Includes 4x countersunk screws. For surface-mounted 65mm HD posts. Price list code is XP-65BP-SET.

domical_cover_50.description: 2-Part Domical Cover for 50mm post base plate
domical_cover_50.notes: Covers base plate for aesthetic finish. Price list code is XP-DC-2P.

domical_cover_65.description: 2-Part Domical Cover for 65mm post base plate
domical_cover_65.notes: Covers 65mm HD base plate. Price list code is XP-65DC-2P.

dress_ring_50.description: Dress Ring for 50mm post (core drilled installation)
dress_ring_50.notes: Covers the hole where post enters concrete. Price list code is XP-DR.

dress_ring_65.description: Dress Ring for 65mm post (core drilled installation) - 115x115mm
dress_ring_65.notes: Covers hole for 65mm HD posts. Price list code is XP-65DR.

flat_top_cap_50.description: Aluminium Flat Top Cap for 50mm post
flat_top_cap_50.notes: Included with 2400mm posts. For 6000mm posts cut to length, cap may need to be sourced. Check if sold separately.

flat_top_cap_65.description: Aluminium Flat Top Cap for 65mm post
flat_top_cap_65.notes: Included with 2400mm posts. For cut-to-length posts from 6000mm stock, may need separate sourcing.

adjustable_foot.description: Adjustable Foot for vertical slat panels wider than 1800mm
adjustable_foot.notes: Single product, no colour variants. Used for vertical slat panels over 1800mm wide.

gate_side_frame_50.notes: Price list has TWO variants: GSF09 (9mm gap) and GSF20 (20mm gap). Choose based on slat spacing. Codes are XP-4200-GSF09 and XP-4200-GSF20. Also available as kits: XP-GKIT-LSET09 and XP-GKIT-LSET20.

gate_side_frame_65.notes: 65mm HD gate frame. Check price list for 65mm-specific GSF codes. May also be XP-4200-65GSF09/20.

gate_rail_65.notes: Not found as separate SKU in price list. Gate rails may be part of gate kit assemblies or custom-cut. The HD rail is XP-6100-HD6545 (65x45mm Heavy Duty RAIL with screw flutes - 6100mm).

gate_rail_90.notes: Not found as separate SKU. May be part of gate kit or custom order.

gate_lock_box_kit_9mm.description: Gate Lock Box Kit with 9mm spaced side frames, inserts, stops, rubber, caps, screws
gate_lock_box_kit_9mm.notes: Complete kit includes: 2x gate side frames (9mm), 2x gate inserts, 3x gate stops (L/R/hinge), 2x rubber, 2x gate frame caps, 1x screw pack. Lock box and lock sold separately.

gate_lock_box_kit_20mm.description: Gate Lock Box Kit with 20mm spaced side frames, inserts, stops, rubber, caps, screws
gate_lock_box_kit_20mm.notes: Same as 9mm kit but with 20mm spacing on side frames.

gate_joiner_block.description: Joiner Block for gate frame corners
gate_joiner_block.notes: Not found as separate SKU. May be included in gate kits (XP-GKIT) or sold as hardware accessory. Check with supplier.

gate_rail_screws.notes: Specific gate rail screw pack not found. May be included in gate kits. General screening screws available under FIXINGS & TOOLS group.

gate_screw_covers.notes: Not found as separate SKU. May be included in gate kits or need manual ordering.

gate_flat_top_cap_50.description: Flat Top Cap for 50mm gate frame
gate_flat_top_cap_50.notes: Gate frame caps are included in gate kits (XP-GKIT-LSET09/20). 2x caps per kit.

gate_flat_top_cap_65.description: Flat Top Cap for 65mm gate frame
gate_flat_top_cap_65.notes: 65mm gate frame cap - not found separately. May need manual sourcing for HD gates.

gate_infill.description: Gate Infill strip for gate side frame
gate_infill.notes: 31x19mm non-punched infill for gate side frame - 4200mm long. Price list code is XP-XBAT-4200-INF.

gate_insert.notes: Gate insert that sits inside gate side frame. Price list code is XP-4200-GI.

hinge_butt.description: Butt Hinge pair for pedestrian gates
hinge_butt.notes: Specific butt hinge for screening gates not found as separate SKU. Hinges may be: D&D brand (KF series) or similar. Check XP-GKIT kits which include fixings but NOT hinges.

hinge_adjustable.description: Adjustable Hinge pair for pedestrian gates
hinge_adjustable.notes: Adjustable hinge for gates. Not found as separate code. May be sourced from D&D Technologies range.

d_latch.notes: The price list has lock boxes (XP-LBOX-DL series) which hold a Lockwood 001 Dead Latch. The D-Latch itself may need separate sourcing. Lock boxes available in all colours.

magna_latch.description: D&D Magna Latch - Top Pull Lockable
magna_latch.notes: D&D Magna Latch Top Pull Lockable. Also available as combo kits: ML-TL-KF-H-FT (with Kwik Fit hinge set, fixed tension). Bulk buy versions: BB-ML-TL.

lock_box.description: Patented non-weld Lock Box for Lockwood 001 Dead Latch
lock_box.notes: Fits Lockwood 001 Dead Latch. Lock sold separately. Available in all screening colours.

gate_stop.notes: Gate stop extrusion. Rubber sold separately. 3 needed per gate (left machined, right machined, hinge side non-machined). Included in XP-GKIT kits.

gate_stop_rubber.notes: Check exact code - may be XP-GSTOP-RUB or similar. Sold separately from gate stop.

sliding_top_rail_65.notes: 65x82mm patented sliding gate top rail. Price list code is XPSG-6100-TR (not QSG-S-6100-TR65). Same extrusion for 65mm and 90mm slats.

sliding_top_rail_90.notes: Same top rail extrusion as 65mm version. Code is XPSG-6100-TR.

sliding_wheel.notes: Single wheel. 2 wheels needed per gate. Comes with M8 threaded block for bottom rail. Code is XPSG-WHEEL.

sliding_wheel_clamp.notes: M8 threaded block and fasteners for clamping wheel to bottom rail. Code is XPSG-WHEEL-CS.

sliding_track_anchor.description: Track Anchor Pin - 6.5mm x 38mm galvanised steel

sliding_guide.notes: Self-adjusting guide. Includes black nylon guide and mounting bracket. Code is XPSG-GUIDE.

sliding_top_rollers.description: Sliding Gate Nylon Roller pair (left + right)
sliding_top_rollers.notes: Pack of 2 (1 left, 1 right). Code is XPSG-TOPROLL-2PK.

sliding_stop.notes: Gate stop for sliding gates. May use standard gate stop (XP-4200-GSTOP) or specific sliding gate stop. Check with supplier.

sliding_gate_post_steel.description: 65x65mm Galvanised Steel Post - 2700mm (includes base plate & cap)
sliding_gate_post_steel.notes: Steel post specifically for sliding gates. Includes top cap and base plate. 2700mm long.

spacer_5mm.notes: UV stabilised ASA plastic. BLACK. 50 pack. Code is XPL-SB-50PK-05MM.

spacer_9mm.notes: UV stabilised ASA plastic. Also available: SM-H9-50PK-B/W (H-spacer for Australis post). Code is XPL-SB-50PK-09MM.

spacer_20mm.notes: UV stabilised ASA plastic. BLACK. Actual spacer is 21mm. Code is XPL-SB-50PK-20MM.

screening_screws.notes: Generic screening screw pack not found in price list. Various screw types in FIXINGS & TOOLS group. Specific screws depend on application - check catalogue installation guide for screw specs.

gate_blade_65.notes: 65x16mm slat with 2x screw flutes and centre web. For gates where slats are screw-fixed to rails.

hd_rail_6545.description: 65x45mm Heavy Duty Rail with screw flutes - 6100mm
hd_rail_6545.notes: Used as gate top/bottom rail for screw-fixed gate blade slats.

posta_letterbox.notes: POSTA letterbox not found in price list. May be a third-party product stocked separately or ordered on request. Mounts between 50x50mm posts at 600mm centres.

gate_frame_cut_to_size.description: QuickScreen Gate Perimeter Frame - per lineal metre cut to size
gate_frame_cut_to_size.notes: Service charge for custom cutting gate frames to size.

sliding_gate_frame_cts_horiz.description: Horizontal Slat Sliding Gate Frame - per LM cut to size
sliding_gate_frame_cts_horiz.notes: Cut to size service for horizontal slat sliding gate frames.

sliding_gate_frame_cts_vert.description: Vertical Slat Sliding Gate Frame - per LM cut to size
sliding_gate_frame_cts_vert.notes: Cut to size service for vertical slat sliding gate frames.

slat_end_cap_65.description: Aluminium End Cap for 65mm slat - 4 pack
slat_end_cap_65.notes: Suffix pattern: XP-EC65-{colour}-4PK. Powder coated aluminium. 4 pack.

slat_end_cap_90.description: Aluminium End Cap for 90mm slat - 4 pack
slat_end_cap_90.notes: Suffix pattern: XP-EC90-{colour}-4PK. Powder coated aluminium. 4 pack.

magna_latch_hinge_combo.description: D&D Magna Latch Top Pull + Kwik Fit Hinge Set
magna_latch_hinge_combo.notes: Combo kit: Magna Latch + Kwik Fit Hinge set with Fixed Tension. All-in-one gate hardware solution.

truclose_hinge.notes: D&D TruClose heavy duty self-closing hinge. Various models available. Check FIXINGS & TOOLS / GATE HARDWARE group.
